index a682e7b..5727f23 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -359,2 +359,7 @@ Day 364 / Week 52 observations:
 - No new enterprise messages. A defensive attempt to send stale system-latest enterprise rows failed before applying settings; reran settings only.
 - Week 52 adjustment: full austerity/harvest mode. Remove S2 credits, drop A to tier 1, keep C tier 4, keep quotas and tier-5 capacity, cut global ops to $10k/day and S2 ops to $20k/day, keep dev/ad spend at $0.
+
+Day 371 / Week 53 observations:
+- Cash recovered to $1.35M, but subscribers fell to 59,488 after 16,659 cancellations. Acquisition is effectively gone. Open issues fell to 5,896.
+- Remaining base is S2 C (~53.2k), S2 A (~5.7k), and a tiny B remainder. Churn is still mostly C (11,762) and A (6,560).
+- Week 53 adjustment: continue harvest. Remove all S2 credits, keep A tier 1 and C tier 4, cut quotas to A=25k/B=100k/C=300k to reduce usage cost, cut ops to $5k/day with no targeted ops, keep tier-5 capacity, and keep dev/ad spend at $0.
